text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Oka Sho—an incredibly
significant Classic race that Umamusume can
enter only once in their careers. The audience is
going wild!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion catches a glimpse of a certain
Umamusume trembling with nerves. Seeing how
seriously she's taking the race leaves Fine Motion
in awe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's winner will be whomever shines brightest.
Met with a firm reminder of the race's
importance, Fine Motion finds new resolve.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being a foreign dignitary, Fine Motion attracts
excessive levels of attention, but an elegant smile
settles the commotion. She looks calm as she gets
ready for the race.
